name: aiservices
description: Paid APIs for AI agents — crypto market data, DeFi yields, technical indicators, IP geolocation, URL metadata, and AI-powered dispute resolution. Free + x402 monetized endpoints.

tools.name: crypto_prices
tools.description: Get current crypto prices for BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL and more (FREE)

tools.name: technical_indicators
tools.description: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands and more for any crypto asset ($0.02 x402)

tools.name: defi_yields
tools.description: DeFi yield rates across protocols and chains ($0.02 x402)

tools.name: ip_geolocation
tools.description: IP geolocation lookup for any IP address (FREE)

tools.name: url_metadata
tools.description: Extract metadata, OpenGraph, and content info from any URL ($0.01 x402)

tools.name: resolve_dispute
tools.description: AI-powered dispute resolution with 7 policy templates — freelance, milestone, SLA, bug bounty, API quality, scope disputes ($0.05 x402)

tools.name: list_policies
tools.description: List all available dispute resolution policy templates (FREE)

pricing.free_tier: Crypto prices, Fear & Greed, IP geolocation, policy listing
pricing.paid_tier: Indicators ($0.02), DeFi yields ($0.02), URL metadata ($0.01), Dispute resolution ($0.05)
pricing.payment: USDC via x402 on Base mainnet
